notes: Chunk contains a single event: part 2 of 2 of the 2026-02-18 earnings-call Q&A transcript (analyst questions + management answers); all candidates come from that one transcript part.
No fiscal_kpis key in this chunk (expected; KPIs appear only on chunk_001), so no KPI-derived candidates.

Skipped 4 vague/non-causal items: group-order dynamic (raised as a speculative mix bucket, not confirmed as a cause), dessert (described only as 'very steady', no causal variance claimed), the DoorDash delivery partnership itself (partner company name banned in driver_name; channel economics captured by delivery_menu_pricing and delivery_sales_mix), and restaurant footprint size flexibility (6,500-10,000 sq ft is a format detail, not a reusable causal variable).

Own brand name 'Cheesecake Factory' is the company legal name so it was kept out of driver names (company-level new_unit_development used instead); separately-named brands Flower Child and North Italia are allowed as brand-level drivers per ontology R9.
'same-shore sales' in the same_store_sales_guidance evidence quote is the transcript's own transcription typo for same-store sales, preserved verbatim.
